summary: Classified the live PR inventory shard without mutations. No shared canonical was selected. Instant close, low-signal close, fix PR, merge, and post-merge closeout are disabled by the job, so useful or proof-blocked PRs are kept open. The only human decisions are scoped to overlapping/maintainer-review cases and security-sensitive #77918 is quarantined separately.
